Sonic the Hedgehog 3 (2024)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $236,115,100Details
International Box Office $253,500,522
Worldwide Box Office $489,615,622
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails reunite against a powerful new adversary, Shadow, a mysterious villain with powers unlike anything they have faced before. With their abilities outmatched in every way, Team Sonic must seek out an unlikely alliance in hopes of stopping Shadow and protecting the planet.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$60,102,146 (25.5% of total gross)
Legs:3.93 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:48.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$122,000,000 (worldwide box office is 4.0 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,761 opening theaters/3,769 max. theaters, 7.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $244,825,385

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: December 20th, 2024 (Wide) by Paramount Pictures
International Releases: December 19th, 2024 (Wide), released as Sonic 3: O Filme (Portugal)
December 20th, 2024 (Wide) (Norway)
December 25th, 2024 (Wide) (Switzerland (German Speaking))
December 25th, 2024 (Wide), released as Sonic 3 - Le Film (France)
December 25th, 2024 (Wide) (Spain)
Video Release: January 21st, 2025 by Paramount Home Video
MPA Rating: PG for action, some violence, rude humor, thematic elements and mild language.
(Rating bulletin 2861 (cert #54995), 11/20/2024)
Running Time: 109 minutes
Franchise: Sonic The Hedgehog
Cast, crew, or production detail: Animal Lead
Filming location (city or town): Tokyo, Japan
Filming location (country): England, Japan
Geographical setting: Japan, London, Montana, New York, Tokyo
Plot point: Death of a Best Friend, Friendly Alien on Earth, Revenge, Talking Animals
Social setting: Abandoned Location
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Time period setting: 1970s, 2020s
Source:Based on Game
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Animation/Live Action
Creative Type:Kids Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Paramount Pictures, Sega Sammy Group, Original Film, Marza Animation Planet, Blur Studio
Production Countries: United States, Japan
Languages: English

Synopsis

Sonic, Knuckles, and Tails reunite against a powerful new adversary, Shadow, a mysterious villain with powers unlike anything they have faced before. With their abilities outmatched in every way, Team Sonic must seek out an unlikely alliance in hopes of stopping Shadow and protecting the planet.

Opening Weekend:$60,102,146 (25.5% of total gross)

Domestic Share:48.2% (domestic box office/worldwide)

Theater counts:3,761 opening theaters/3,769 max. theaters, 7.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $244,825,385
